title: Context Pack Manifest
description: Integrity manifest for a ticket context pack produced by build_context_pack.py

ticket_id.description: Ticket identifier in WORD-DIGITS format (e.g. TICKET-0001)

allowed_file_count.description: Number of code files copied from the allowlist

vault_note_count.description: Number of vault notes copied from the notes list

max_allowed.description: Maximum allowlist size enforced at build time

hash_algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for file integrity. Always sha256.

files.description: Map of pack-relative file path to prefixed sha256 digest (sha256:<64hex>)

additionalProperties.description: Prefixed SHA-256 digest in format sha256:<64 lowercase hex characters>
